metadata.name: security_impact_same_function_counterfactual_eval
metadata.purpose: Causal sanity check holding source obligation and function identity fixed while changing only release assembly.
metadata.claim_boundary: Four controlled pairs are a causal sanity check, not external validation or a prevalence sample.

functions.protected_entity: offset plus length before accepting the resulting end position
functions.source_guard_excerpt: end = offset + len; if (end > maxbytes || end < 0) return -27;
functions.source_code: end = offset + len; if (end > maxbytes || end < 0) return -27; return end;
functions.first_hazard_excerpt: The function returns end as an accepted file range.
functions.asm_text:
fallocate_post_overflow_guard:
	.seh_endprologue
	testq	%rcx, %rcx
	js	.L3
	testq	%rdx, %rdx
	jle	.L3
	leaq	(%rcx,%rdx), %rax
	cmpq	%r8, %rax
	jg	.L6
	ret
	.p2align 4,,10
	.p2align 3
.L6:
	movq	$-27, %rax
	ret
	.p2align 4,,10
	.p2align 3
.L3:
	movq	$-22, %rax
	ret
	.seh_endproc

functions.protected_entity: allocation byte count before returning it to an allocator
functions.source_guard_excerpt: bytes = count * width; if (bytes < 0 || bytes / count != width) return -75;
functions.source_code: bytes = count * width; if (bytes < 0 || bytes / count != width) return -75; return bytes;
functions.first_hazard_excerpt: The function returns bytes as the accepted allocation size.
functions.asm_text:
allocation_post_multiply_guard:
	.seh_endprologue
	testl	%ecx, %ecx
	jle	.L9
	testl	%edx, %edx
	jle	.L9
	movl	%ecx, %eax
	imull	%edx, %eax
	ret
	.p2align 4,,10
	.p2align 3
.L9:
	movl	$-22, %eax
	ret
	.seh_endproc

functions.protected_entity: allocation byte count before returning it to an allocator
functions.source_guard_excerpt: bytes = count * width; if (bytes < 0 || bytes / count != width) return -75;
functions.source_code: bytes = count * width; if (bytes < 0 || bytes / count != width) return -75; return bytes;
functions.first_hazard_excerpt: The function returns bytes as the accepted allocation size.
functions.asm_text:
allocation_post_multiply_guard:
	.seh_endprologue
	testl	%ecx, %ecx
	movl	%edx, %r9d
	jle	.L8
	testl	%edx, %edx
	jle	.L8
	movl	%ecx, %r8d
	imull	%edx, %r8d
	testl	%r8d, %r8d
	js	.L10
	movl	%r8d, %eax
	cltd
	idivl	%ecx
	cmpl	%r9d, %eax
	jne	.L10
.L6:
	movl	%r8d, %eax
	ret
	.p2align 4,,10
	.p2align 3
.L10:
	movl	$-75, %r8d
	jmp	.L6
	.p2align 4,,10
	.p2align 3
.L8:
	movl	$-22, %r8d
	jmp	.L6
	.seh_endproc

functions.asm_text:

# %bb.0:
	leaq	(%rdx,%rcx), %r9
	cmpq	%r8, %r9
	movq	$-27, %rax
	cmovleq	%r9, %rax
	testq	%rdx, %rdx
	movq	$-22, %rdx
	cmovleq	%rdx, %rax
	testq	%rcx, %rcx
	cmovsq	%rdx, %rax
	retq

# %bb.0:
	testq	%rcx, %rcx
	sets	%al
	testq	%rdx, %rdx
	setle	%r9b
	orb	%al, %r9b
	movq	$-22, %rax
	jne	.LBB0_2
# %bb.1:
	addq	%rcx, %rdx
	movq	$-27, %rcx

	cmovsq	%rcx, %rax
	cmpq	%r8, %rdx
	cmovgq	%rcx, %rax
.LBB0_2:
	retq
